round62_reference.winner_reason: Best weighted ultra-low repair score with no protected-scale regression penalty; preserves 1x/0.10x/0.08x and improves the 0.03x pain set.

r63a_ul_scd_alpha09995.description: Below 0.08x only weaken the once-per-phase SCD alpha from 0.999 to 0.9995; keep cadence/target unchanged.
r63a_ul_scd_alpha09995.rationale: Pure “too strong” test: if the ultra-low distortion comes from the SCD cut being slightly over-aggressive, the mildest repair is a smaller cross-covariance shrink.

round63a_extra_patch.name: r63a_ul_scd_alpha09995
round63a_extra_patch.description: Below 0.08x only weaken the once-per-phase SCD alpha from 0.999 to 0.9995; keep cadence/target unchanged.
round63a_extra_patch.rationale: Pure “too strong” test: if the ultra-low distortion comes from the SCD cut being slightly over-aggressive, the mildest repair is a smaller cross-covariance shrink.

selection.note: Complementary branch signal: SCD gating repairs dKg_yy / dKa_xx / overall versus Round61 and may trade against Round62 mainly on rx_y.

r63a_ul_scd_delay6p0.description: Below 0.08x only delay the once-per-phase SCD trigger from 2.0 s to 6.0 s after each rotation stop.
r63a_ul_scd_delay6p0.rationale: Direct “too early” test: preserve the same alpha and target block, but push the one-shot cut later so the static update settles first.

round63a_extra_patch.name: r63a_ul_scd_delay6p0
round63a_extra_patch.description: Below 0.08x only delay the once-per-phase SCD trigger from 2.0 s to 6.0 s after each rotation stop.
round63a_extra_patch.rationale: Direct “too early” test: preserve the same alpha and target block, but push the one-shot cut later so the static update settles first.

selection.note: Partial ultra-low repair: at least one target improves, but the full dKg_yy / dKa_xx / rx_y / mean / median set does not move together.

r63a_ul_scd_core3_only.description: Below 0.08x only shrink the SCD target from the full scale block to the Round61 backbone trio: dKg_xx / dKg_xy / dKg_zz.
r63a_ul_scd_core3_only.rationale: Interpretable subset test: keep the ultra-low SCD idea only on the three states that still look structurally helpful, and stop suppressing yy / Ka_xx-side cross-covariances.

round63a_extra_patch.name: r63a_ul_scd_core3_only
round63a_extra_patch.description: Below 0.08x only shrink the SCD target from the full scale block to the Round61 backbone trio: dKg_xx / dKg_xy / dKg_zz.
round63a_extra_patch.rationale: Interpretable subset test: keep the ultra-low SCD idea only on the three states that still look structurally helpful, and stop suppressing yy / Ka_xx-side cross-covariances.

selection.note: Partial ultra-low repair: at least one target improves, but the full dKg_yy / dKa_xx / rx_y / mean / median set does not move together.

r63a_ul_scd_floor_off.description: Below 0.08x disable the iter2 once-per-phase SCD entirely and keep the rest of Round61 unchanged.
r63a_ul_scd_floor_off.rationale: Floor ablation test: checks whether the remaining ultra-low distortion is largely coming from the SCD branch itself, not just from the feedback alpha side.

round63a_extra_patch.name: r63a_ul_scd_floor_off
round63a_extra_patch.description: Below 0.08x disable the iter2 once-per-phase SCD entirely and keep the rest of Round61 unchanged.
round63a_extra_patch.rationale: Floor ablation test: checks whether the remaining ultra-low distortion is largely coming from the SCD branch itself, not just from the feedback alpha side.

selection.note: Partial ultra-low repair: at least one target improves, but the full dKg_yy / dKa_xx / rx_y / mean / median set does not move together.

branch_winner.name: r63a_ul_scd_floor_off
branch_winner.reason: Best protected no-regression SCD-only ultra-low branch score versus Round61 across the 0.05x / 0.03x target set.

no_replacement_reason: Round63-A did not show a clear weighted ultra-low replacement over the existing Round62 winner; treat the best candidate as a branch/complement unless later evidence says otherwise.
